goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should 'include free parking'.
The hotel should have 'a star of 3'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for '6 people' and '4 nights' starting from 'monday'.
If the booking fails how about '2 nights'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'wednesday' and should go to 'london liverpool street'.
The train should 'arrive by 18:30' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free wifi and should include free parking
The hotel should have a star of 3
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 6 people and 4 nights starting from monday
If the booking fails how about 2 nights
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave on wednesday and should go to london liverpool street
The train should arrive by 18:30 and should depart from cambridge
Make sure you get travel time and train ID
